change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Graduate School records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, administrative records, statistics, announcements, speeches, reports, catalogs, applications, minutes, program reviews and external reports.
did.abstract: 11 volumes of correspondence, administrative records, and statistics of the Cornell University Graduate School; also, announcements, speeches, reports, catalogs, applications, minutes, department self studies, program reviews, and external reports. Includes Graduate School annual reports for 1922 and 1952/1953-1986/1987 as well as 2001/2002-2002/2003.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Martin Heggestad, January 2004 Daniel W. Young, July 2011

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: 11 volumes of correspondence, administrative records, and statistics of the Cornell University Graduate School; also, announcements, speeches, reports, catalogs, applications, minutes, department self studies, program reviews, and external reports. Includes Graduate School annual reports for 1922 and 1952/1953-1986/1987 as well as 2001/2002-2002/2003. The report for 1922 is titled "Problems of the Graduate School: an informal report by the Dean, to the members of the faculty"; it was conceived of as a supplement to the annual Dean's report to the President.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Graduate School records, #12-1-1776. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A complete set of Graduate School Annual Reports can be found in ARP 1424.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: More recent annual reports can be found on the Graduate School website: https://gradschool.cornell.edu/about/publications-and-reports/annual-reports/
